convention.case: lowercase folders + filenames; case-sensitive servers will fail otherwise
convention.subfolders: gallery/<event-name>/ for cohesive multi-shot sets; otherwise flat under gallery/

formats.photos: JPG q82 progressive, max 1600px on long edge, EXIF stripped (auto-orient applied first)
formats.poster: JPG q82, max 1280px on long edge

used_in: header logo via shared.jsx Logo component
logo.notes: Keep PNG for transparency; only ~84KB so no need to convert.

used_in: available — current hero.jsx uses a static Ken Burns image, not the video
hero.video.notes: Vertical 9:16, no audio. Kept in case the hero is restored to a video treatment.

hero.poster.alt: Blue, silver and purple balloon arch with star and moon foil accents in a marble entryway
hero.poster.notes: Replaced 2026-04-28 — was the pink/gold poster, now a celestial blue/silver/purple arch.

pending_conversion.note: All 14 HEIC files were converted via the convert-heic.command script (macOS sips), then re-optimized through the standard convert pipeline. Originals and intermediate JPEGs were removed from _pending-conversion/.
